title: Global Citizenship Solutions
subtitle: GLOBAL PASSPORT INDEX — BIG DATA VISUALIZATION
description: Architected a massive Global Passport Index featuring dynamic big data plotting for 120+ countries. Developed custom plugins to handle 1,000+ data points, integrating Google Charts and Chart.js for real-time visualization. Reverse-engineered legacy systems to improve site architecture, scalability, and performance. View website ~/>

title: National AI Awards
subtitle: EVENT-DRIVEN INTERACTIVE SITE
description: Developed a high-end, interactive site featuring sophisticated CSS/JS animations. Engineered "State Logic" functionality allowing the site to automatically toggle between three distinct modes — Nominations, Winners, and Static — based on the event lifecycle. View website ~/>
